# Rack N Roll

> Erie's premier karaoke bar since 1989. 6 nights a week, great specials, good food. Come as you are.

## About

Rack N Roll is a karaoke bar and restaurant in Erie, Pennsylvania that has been a local staple since 1989. Known for its welcoming atmosphere, live karaoke 6 nights a week, affordable drink specials, and solid bar food. Whether you're a seasoned singer or a first-timer, Rack N Roll is the place to be.

## Location

Erie, Pennsylvania, USA

## What We Offer

- **Karaoke** — Live karaoke 6 nights a week with a massive song library
- **Food** — Full bar menu with classic American pub fare
- **Drinks** — Daily drink specials, beer, wine, and cocktails
- **Events** — Themed nights, karaoke competitions, and private parties
- **Gallery** — Photos from events and karaoke nights

## Pages

- [Home](https://racknrollerie.com/)
- [Events](https://racknrollerie.com/events)
- [Menu](https://racknrollerie.com/menu)
- [Gallery](https://racknrollerie.com/gallery)

## Contact

Visit us in Erie, PA. Follow us on social media for the latest events and specials.
